import io
import string
import list

fn find_index(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

fn parse_all(_ tokens: List<String>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  for tok in tokens
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      result = list.push(result, n)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  let nums = parse_all(tokens)
  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end
  match find_index(nums, target)
  when Some(i)
    println("index=#{i}")
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end
